value.found_quote: Gemini 3.5 Pro was announced at Google I/O on May 19, 2026 but is still in limited Vertex preview, with GA expected in June 2026.
value.rationale: The page describes Google's Gemini 3.5 Pro, stating it was announced at Google I/O 2026 and is currently in limited Vertex preview with general availability targeted for June 2026. This substantiates the claim that Google offers (in preview) Gemini 3.5 Pro.
